name: Gradient
description: Gradient — Fine-tuning and deployment platform for LLMs with a simple API and managed GPU infrastructure.

seo.title: Gradient — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Gradient: Gradient — Fine-tuning and deployment platform for LLMs with a simple API and managed GPU infrastructure.

when_to_use: Fine-tuning open LLMs on proprietary data through a managed API
Deploying private fine-tuned models without managing GPUs
Running domain adaptation on Llama-based models via REST API
Combining fine-tuning with RAG for enterprise knowledge tasks

pros: Simple API for fine-tuning open LLMs
Managed GPU infra removes DevOps overhead
Decent pricing for small fine-tune jobs
cons: Smaller model catalog than Together or Fireworks
Limited customization beyond standard LoRA flows
review.verdict: A pragmatic middle ground for teams who want fine-tuning without running their own GPUs.
review.best_for: Product teams fine-tuning open LLMs without dedicated ML infra staff
review.not_for: Research labs needing cutting-edge models or deep training control

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
